hypothesis: On US500 M15 during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC), pullbacks to EMA50 within a confirmed EMA50>EMA200 uptrend (and mirror for downtrend) resume the primary trend, because index trend-following flow dominates intraday mean reverters.

regime_filter.rationale: Require EMA50/EMA200 alignment plus ADX>=18 so we only fade pullbacks inside a real trend; blocks trades in choppy ranges.

entry.long: EMA50 > EMA200 AND low <= EMA50 + 0.4*ATR14 AND close > EMA50 AND 40 <= RSI14 <= 65 AND in_session AND regime_on
entry.short: EMA50 < EMA200 AND high >= EMA50 - 0.4*ATR14 AND close < EMA50 AND 35 <= RSI14 <= 60 AND in_session AND regime_on

exit.trailing: move SL to breakeven at +1R; trail by EMA20 after +1.5R
